data.body: E3 harness BUILT (subagent): e3_metrics.py (414 LOC pure) + replay_candidate.py (653 LOC driver: sample/run --candidate|--main/analyze/selfcheck) + test_e3_metrics.py (15 tests pass) + runs/e3/{sample.jsonl 200, baseline.jsonl 200, fp_control_pool.jsonl 50, thresholds.json} + README. Independently applied the git clone --local isolation fix + verified sidecar-strip neutralizes Pass-2 recall (prior_concerns->[] after stripping working-tree *-REVIEW_RESULT.json; pass1.py:504 reads filesystem via os.listdir, config.py:116 REBAR_TRACKER_DIR wins — no clone commit needed). Deterministic ACs pass. TWO DEVIATIONS NEEDING DECISION: (1) MATERIAL cohort version: plan pins cohort to IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION=plan-v3 (bumped 2026-07-15, only ~6 clean baselines) but the '~200 historical reviews' are plan-v2 (223 eligible/208 PASS/15 BLOCK). Subagent defaulted cohort=plan-v2 + fail-loud unless build scores plan-v2. To run E3 at ~200 scale needs a plan-v2 BUILD (gate version comes from installed rebar, not --repo-root), risking harness/API drift; OR run plan-v3 cohort (~6, weak) via --cohort plan-v3. (2) Full flip-measurement needs a PROTOTYPE of R1's candidate detector (run --candidate), but R1 is gated/unbuilt; run --main gives null-floor baseline only. Eval ~450 review_plan calls (candidate 300 + main 150). CONCLUSION: E3 eval is entangled (version segmentation + candidate prototype) unlike self-contained E2/E6 — HOLDING E3 eval pending decision; continuing E2 (round-4 review running) + E6 (eval running) autonomously.
